chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-566 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 03.09.2020 Mr. Muhammad Ali Kolachi, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G Sindh *** Through this petition, petitioner is seeking declaration that act of private respondents No.8 to 11 of allegedly getting excess water from Jamrao West Branch in collusion with official respondents is illegal and unlawful. We have specifically asked the question from the learned counsel for the petitioner that how this petition is maintainable, as the petitioner has appropriate remedy for redressal of his grievance, agitated through this petition, before the Irrigation authorities, which admittedly has not been exhausted by the petitioner before approaching this Court, but learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to give any satisfactory answer. Accordingly, this petition being misconceived and not maintainable stands dismissed, leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the concerned forum for redressal of his grievance, if any, if he so desires as per law and on filing such proceedings, the same shall be decided by the competent forum strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
